mapper.select: SELECT USER_NUM, USER_ID, USER_PASSWORD, USER_EMAIL, USER_ZIP_CODE, USER_ADDRESS, USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS, USER_PHONE_NUMBER, USER_ROLE FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER (USER_NUM, USER_ID, USER_PASSWORD, USER_EMAIL, USER_ZIP_CODE, USER_ADDRESS, USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS, USER_PHONE_NUMBER) VALUES(#{userNum}, #{userId}, #{userPassword}, #{userEmail}, #{userZipCode}, #{userAddress}, #{userDetailAddress}, #{userPhoneNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NUM, USER_ID, USER_PASSWORD, USER_EMAIL, USER_ZIP_CODE, USER_ADDRESS, USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS, USER_PHONE_NUMBER, USER_ROLE FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_NUM, USER_ID, USER_PASSWORD, USER_EMAIL, USER_ZIP_CODE, USER_ADDRESS, USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS, USER_PHONE_NUMBER, USER_ROLE FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail}
